categories.name: ADJECTIVES OF THE YOUNG AND THE RESTLESS

questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
"Abby, I hear The Naked Heiress is gonna be on Jeopardy! that's huge!""Mom, please. I am rich and famous." [Sighs]"Honey, don't you think you're being..."...this adjective that means "world-weary" & "cynical"--it doesn't mean "covered in green gemstones"

[IMAGE CLUE]
"We can never do this again. Nobody, and I mean nobody, can know about it.""Tres romantic, Nick. What are you implying, that I'm not..."...this 11-letter adjective meaning reliable & responsible like a Boy Scout

[IMAGE CLUE]
"Please, Lily, understand, everything I did was to keep you and the twins safe.""Cane, you pretended that you were dead and made me think that I was sleeping with a ghost. I ended up in an insane asylum. You're..."...this 10-letter adjective from the Latin for "look down on" (& favored by Daffy Duck on occasion)

[IMAGE CLUE]
"Oh, Jack, it feels just like yesterday that you and Diane and I were celebrating the IPO.""I've had my eye on you since before Diane died, and now I have even more reason to be..."...this doubtful word that's in the title of Elvis' last No. 1 pop hit

[IMAGE CLUE]
"Dear God. You manipulate everyone around you, just like a marionette. You are downright..."...this adjective, also the title of a hit Broadway musical that features Munchkins & flying monkeys

final.clue: He was executed in 1780 & buried in Tappan, New York; his remains were moved to Westminster Abbey in 1821
